choices.title: Answer these questions to start a new game...

choice.title: Very well then.
choice.response: A servant girl spills your wine. Will you:

choices.title: A servant girl spills your wine. Will you:

choice.title: Feed her to the lions as a punishment.
choice.response: She was no better than lion food anyway!

choice.title: Hang her for the show of disrespect.
choice.response: Yeah, that'll teach her some respect!

choice.title: Have her properly whipped.
choice.response: Isn't that a bit, lame, for such behaviour?

choices.title: Answer two more questions to start a new game...

choice.title: Go on with the questions.
choice.response: A starving farmer refuses to give his crop. Will you:

choices.title: A starving farmer refuses to give his crop. Will you:

choice.title: Mercilessly slaughter the farmer and his family.
choice.response: That'll teach the farmer who's in charge.

choice.title: Send the farmer and his family to the mines.
choice.response: What? You let them live after such disobedience?

choice.title: Dismember the farmer and take the crops.

choices.title: Answer one more question to start a new game...

choice.title: I don't have all day.
choice.response: Two women claim to be a baby's mother. Will you:

choices.title: Two women claim to be a baby's mother. Will you:

choice.title: Stab the baby and kill the less shocked woman.
choice.response: Out of the box thinking. I like it.

choice.title: Give them swords and lean back for the show.
Kill them all for wasting your time.
choice.response: A messy solution but it works.
